title: Agro-Commodity Supply Chain Ontology
notes: Entities and relationships across three work-streams — A (bean sourcing & procurement), B (planning, blend & inventory), C (sales, contracting & fulfilment) — derived from the supply-chain design diagram. The datasource registry doubles as a system-of-record maturity view. Skills (skills/) and the KB registry (kb/) bind into the ontology by apiName and are resolved by build/bindings.py into build/bindings.json (the reverse index). A first set of MVP credit / order-triage actions is defined; the broader A/B/C action catalog still comes from the work-stream specs. Property→column mappings are pending where sources are informal.

datasources.note: Transactional system of record (orders, deliveries, process orders)
Stock from SAP; 3P warehouses via EDI; US 3P manual (no EDI)
Yield not in SAP; manual capture today
Inbound POs by customer email today; regional mailboxes planned
Offers via email / WhatsApp / broker today
Trading desk; basis not yet systematised
Origin execution channels: portal / email / Excel

actionTypes.description: Set or raise a customer's credit limit; the enforced credit rules live here.

validation.message: Above the approved limit requires collateral or a committee override

actionTypes.description: Open an order-triage exception when a mismatch or hold is detected.
Allocate available stock to a sales order, respecting regional stock rules.
